backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor implementing the backend for a video platform, including user profile management, video upload, commenting, and subscription features with role-based access control.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two implemented features—richer search result cards and voice search—to their corresponding source files and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key implementation details for build planning reference.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the Mediatube React app, loading the Google Identity Services script and mounting the app at the root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with all application routes, wraps the app in QueryClient, ThemeProvider, GoogleAuthProvider, and LanguageProvider.
frontend/src/components/AddToPlaylistBut: A button component that opens a popover allowing authenticated users to add or remove a video from their playlists, and create new playlists inline.
frontend/src/components/AdOverlay.tsx: Video ad overlay component that displays a banner ad with a countdown timer, auto-dismisses after 15 seconds, and shows a skip button after 5 seconds.
frontend/src/components/BottomNav.tsx: A fixed bottom navigation bar for mobile screens with links to Home, Shorts, Upload, Subscriptions, and Profile, highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/CameraRecordingM: A full-featured camera recording modal supporting filters, zoom, music selection, duration options, and mic selection for capturing short video clips.
Displays a list of comments for a video and provides an authenticated comment submission form, requiring Internet Identity for posting.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCar: Renders a single community post card with author info, timestamp, optional image attachment, and a delete option for the post owner.
frontend/src/components/CommunityPostCom: A composer UI for authenticated users to create community posts with optional image attachments, showing upload progress and a sign-in prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/EditProfileModal: A modal dialog component that allows authenticated users to edit their channel name, handle, and description, with validation and backend update via the useUpdateUserProfile hook.
frontend/src/components/FilterSelector.t: A horizontally scrollable filter button bar that renders available filter options and highlights the currently selected filter.
frontend/src/components/LanguageSelector: A dropdown menu component that lets users switch the app's display language from a predefined list of seven languages using the LanguageContext.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: The main app shell providing a sticky top navigation bar with search (including voice search), auth controls, sidebar navigation, and a bottom nav, wrapping all page content.
frontend/src/components/MusicPickerPanel: A bottom sheet panel that displays a music library allowing users to preview and select a background music track (or none) for their content.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A forced-open dialog for first-time users to create their channel profile (name, handle, description, avatar), saving to the backend for Internet Identity users or localStorage for Google users.
frontend/src/components/RecommendedVideo: Renders a sidebar list of recommended video thumbnails and metadata, filtering out the currently playing video and showing skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/components/ReelCard.tsx: Displays a single full-screen reel video with autoplay/pause based on active state, mute toggle, like button, comment drawer trigger, share button, subscribe button, and view count incrementing.
frontend/src/components/ReelCommentsDraw: A bottom-sheet drawer component that fetches and displays comments for a given video, allows authenticated users to submit new comments, and prevents touch events from propagating to the parent scroll container.
frontend/src/components/ShareButton.tsx: A button component that copies a video's shareable URL to the clipboard using the modern Clipboard API with a legacy execCommand fallback, showing a toast notification on success or failure.
A subscribe/unsubscribe button that checks the current user's subscription status against a channel's subscriber list and toggles subscription via dedicated hooks, supporting both compact and full-size variants.
frontend/src/components/TrendingVideos.t: A horizontally scrollable section displaying the top 10 non-short trending videos with rank badges, duration overlays, view counts, and left/right scroll controls.
frontend/src/components/VideoCard.tsx: A reusable video card component that renders a video thumbnail with duration and short badges, channel avatar, title, view count, upload date, and optional subscribe button, linking to either the video page or reels.
frontend/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx: A full-featured video player component with play/pause, volume, seek, fullscreen controls, and an ad overlay shown before long-form video playback.
frontend/src/contexts/LanguageContext.ts: React context providing language selection state (supporting 7 language codes) with localStorage persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous backend actor using React Query, invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddComment.ts: Mutation hook that calls the backend to add a comment to a video and invalidates the comments query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddVideoToPlaylist: Mutation hook that adds a video to a playlist via the backend actor and invalidates related playlist queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAdminRemoveVideo.t: Mutation hook that calls adminRemoveVideo on the backend actor and invalidates admin/video queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCameraRecorder.ts: Hook managing camera/microphone access, MediaRecorder-based video recording, audio device enumeration, facing mode switching, and elapsed time tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateApiKey.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new API key via the backend actor and invalidates the apiKeys query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreateCommunityPos: Mutation hook that creates a community post with optional attachment and invalidates community posts on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useCreatePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that creates a new playlist with a title and description and invalidates the playlists query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeleteCommunityPos: Mutation hook that deletes a community post by ID and invalidates community post queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useDeletePlaylist.ts: Mutation hook that deletes a playlist by ID and invalidates the playlists query on success.
Query hook that fetches admin dashboard data, enabled only when the actor is ready and the user is authenticated.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllVideos.ts: Query hook that fetches all videos from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetApiKeys.ts: Query hook that fetches the authenticated user's API keys from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current caller's user profile from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetChannelVideos.t: Query hook that fetches all videos belonging to a specific channel principal.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetComments.ts: Query hook that fetches comments for a given video ID from the backend.
Query hook that fetches all community posts sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCommunityPostsB: Query hook that fetches community posts for a specific channel principal, sorted newest-first.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetMonetizationSta: Query hook that fetches monetization statistics for the authenticated user from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistById.ts: Query hook that fetches a single playlist by its ID from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetPlaylistsByOwne: Query hook that fetches all playlists owned by the currently authenticated user.
Query hook that fetches the videos contained in a specific playlist by ID.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetSubscribers.ts: React Query hook that fetches the list of subscriber Principals for a given channel using the actor.
React Query hook that fetches trending video metadata from the backend actor, with window focus refetch disabled.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetUserProfile.ts: React Query hook that fetches a user's profile by Principal, returning null if the user or actor is unavailable.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetVideo.ts: React Query hook that fetches a single video's metadata by video ID from the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useGoogleAuth.ts: Provides a React context and provider for Google Identity Services authentication, persisting the parsed JWT user session in localStorage.
frontend/src/hooks/useIncrementViewCount: React Query mutation hook that increments a video's view count and invalidates related video queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context, provider, and hook for Internet Identity authentication using DFINITY's AuthClient, managing login state and identity persistence.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: React Query hook that checks whether the currently authenticated caller has admin privileges via the backend actor.
frontend/src/hooks/useMusicMixer.ts: Hook that mixes a music track with a video blob's audio using the Web Audio API and OfflineAudioContext, returning a WAV blob with progress tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveVideoFromPla: React Query mutation hook that removes a video from a playlist and invalidates relevant playlist queries, showing toast notifications on success or error.
frontend/src/hooks/useRevokeApiKey.ts: React Query mutation hook that revokes an API key via the actor and invalidates the API keys query, with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: React Query mutation hook that saves the caller's user profile via the actor and invalidates the current user profile query.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchVideos.ts: React Query hook that searches for videos by a search term using the backend actor, only triggering when the term is non-empty.
frontend/src/hooks/useSetProfileImage.ts: React Query mutation hook that updates the caller's profile avatar by fetching the current profile and saving it with new image bytes, with toast feedback.
frontend/src/hooks/useSubscribeToChannel: Exports two React Query mutation hooks for subscribing to and unsubscribing from a channel by Principal, invalidating subscriber queries on success.
React Query mutation hook that updates the caller's user profile (name, description, handle, avatar) via the actor and invalidates the current user profile query.
frontend/src/hooks/useUploadVideo.ts: React Query mutation hook that uploads a video file with metadata to the backend actor, supporting upload progress callbacks and invalidating video queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useVideoFilter.ts: React hook that creates a canvas-based filtered MediaStream from a video element, supporting CSS filters and zoom (1.0–3.0) via drawImage cropping at ~30fps using requestAnimationFrame.
frontend/src/hooks/useVoiceSearch.ts: React hook wrapping the Web Speech API to provide voice-to-text search functionality, exposing listening state, transcript, error messages, and start/stop controls.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines a multilingual translation map (at least English and Spanish) covering UI strings for navigation, auth, subscriptions, search, community, comments, and media features.
frontend/src/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point that defines CSS custom properties for a YouTube-style dark theme, brand color tokens, and utility classes for scrollbar hiding and gradient text/backgrounds.
frontend/src/main.tsx: React app entry point that mounts the root component wrapped with React Query's QueryClientProvider and a custom InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminDashboardPage.ts: Admin dashboard page that displays platform stats, a list of users, and videos with the ability to remove videos, gated behind an admin role check via Internet Identity authentication.
frontend/src/pages/ApiKeysPage.tsx: Page for managing API keys, allowing authenticated users to create labeled keys, view/copy/mask them, and revoke active keys with confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/ChannelPage.tsx: Displays a channel's profile page including avatar, subscriber count, videos, playlists, and community posts fetched via React Query hooks. Supports tabs for Videos, Shorts, Playlists, and Community sections with a subscribe button.
frontend/src/pages/CommunityPage.tsx: Renders the community feed page with a post composer and a list of community post cards fetched via a custom hook. Shows skeleton loaders while loading and an empty state when no posts exist.
frontend/src/pages/CopyrightPolicyPage.t: Static informational page displaying Mediatube's copyright policy including content ownership rules, DMCA takedown process, and contact details. Uses i18n translations and styled section cards.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page showing a horizontally scrollable category filter bar and a responsive grid of video cards fetched from the backend. Displays skeleton loaders during fetch and an empty state when no videos are available.
frontend/src/pages/MonetizationPage.tsx: Dashboard page showing a creator's monetization stats (total earnings, revenue metrics) with loading skeletons, error handling, and a refresh button. Requires authentication and gates content behind a sign-in prompt.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistDetailPage.ts: Detail page for a single playlist showing its videos with thumbnails, view counts, and durations. Playlist owners can remove individual videos or delete the entire playlist via confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/PlaylistsPage.tsx: Displays the authenticated user's playlists in a card grid with thumbnail previews, and provides a dialog to create new playlists with a title and description.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Shows the current user's profile page with avatar, channel info, videos, and community posts tabs, supporting both Internet Identity and Google auth with profile editing and avatar upload.
frontend/src/pages/ReelsPage.tsx: Renders a vertical snap-scroll feed of short videos (Reels), with an active-index tracker and a camera FAB that opens a recording modal to upload a new Short.
frontend/src/pages/SearchResultsPage.tsx: Reads the query string from the URL, fetches matching videos via useSearchVideos, and displays results in a responsive grid with loading skeletons and empty-state messaging.
frontend/src/pages/ShortsPage.tsx: Filters all videos to only short-form content and displays them in a multi-column grid with loading skeletons and an empty state when no Shorts exist.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionsPage.tsx: Fetches the authenticated user's subscribed channels and renders their non-short videos in a grid, with unauthenticated and empty-state fallback screens.
frontend/src/pages/UploadVideoPage.tsx: Page component for uploading videos, supporting file selection, camera recording, music picking, title/description input, and upload progress tracking with authentication checks for Internet Identity and Google.
frontend/src/pages/VideoPlayerPage.tsx: Page component that displays a video player with metadata, uploader profile, comments, and recommended videos, incrementing the view count on load and showing skeletons while loading.
frontend/src/types/filters.ts: Defines TypeScript types and a configuration map for seven CSS-based video filters (normal, beauty, vivid, b&w, warm, cool, vintage) along with their display names, CSS filter strings, and icons.
frontend/src/types/music.ts: Defines the MusicTrack interface and exports a static MUSIC_LIBRARY array of five sample music tracks with id, name, artist, URL, and duration.
frontend/src/utils/avatarHelpers.ts: Provides two utility functions: converting a Uint8Array image blob to a base64 data URL with MIME-type detection, and generating two-letter initials from a display name.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Exports three formatting utilities: formatViewCount (K/M suffixes), formatTimeAgo (nanosecond timestamp to relative string), and formatDuration (seconds to HH:MM:SS or MM:SS).
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility module for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage persistence helpers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the theme with YouTube-style and Mediatube brand color tokens, custom fonts, box shadows, border radii, and accordion/fade-in animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for Mediatube tracking two completed features (richer search result cards and voice search) and two pending action requests, at schema version 1.0.0.
